°°
Joining Ommaya from CDMX, we’re thrilled to welcome Seli to the label for her new project, Lateral Alice. Written more than 2,000 meters above sea level in the forests of Tapalpa near Guadalajara, misty pine-covered highlands whose essence bleeds into the music, the EP radiates an atmosphere that envelops its laser-laden, breaky soundscapes. With glitched-out vocals commanding lines of zappy audio circuitry and unrelenting sub, each track is an experience unto itself.

On remix duties, Guadalajara-based artist Buena Tarde reimagines Usual Salt as a half-to-full-time head knocker, oozing with balanced dread and wonder. For the second remix, Ommaya co-head Sawyer James realigns Haloclina’s rattling percs and alchemizes them into razor-sharp fangs.
